title: CASP check result
description: The stable JSON report emitted by `casp check --json`. schema_version bumps only on a breaking change to this shape; additive fields do not bump it. See docs/check-json.md.

schema_version.description: The report schema version. Additive fields do not change it.

casp_version.description: The version of the CASP implementation that produced the report.

verdict.description: Overall outcome: clean (no FAIL) or drift (at least one FAIL).

exit_code.description: 0 clean, 1 drift. The process exits with this code.

id.description: Internal finding id. May be refactored; prefer `rule` for stable references.

rule.description: The stable public rule code (CASP-<AREA>-<NNN>) this finding belongs to. See `casp rules` / `casp explain <CODE>`.

severity.description: pass and warn never block; fail blocks the push.

label.description: One-line human summary of the finding.

fix.description: Remediation hint, or null on a pass.
